Lkkaln] yksd lHkk] 59] lkmFk ,osU;w] ubZ fnYyh A Þ¼24½ izks- jke 'kadj] &lnL; Lkkaln] yksd lHkk] 43] ukWFkZ ,osU;w] ubZ fnYyh A [Qk- la- 29&8@2016&,uvkbZ] MkSyh pØcrhZ] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT (Department of Empowerment of Persons With Disabilities, DIVYANGJAN) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th February, 2018 S.O. 549(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 (34 of 1992), the Central Government hereby appoint Shri Kinjarapu Ram Mohan Naidu, Member of Parliament, Lok Sabha and Prof. Ram Shankar, Member of Parliament, Lok Sabha as members of General Council of the Rehabilitation Council of India, and for that purpose, make the following further amendments, appointed -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] under clause (h) of sub-section (3) of section 3 “, for serial numbers (23) and (24) under the heading and entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “(23) Shri Kinjarapu Ram Mohan Naidu, -Member Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha), 59, South Avenue, New Delhi “(24) Prof. Ram Shankar, -Member Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) 43, North Avenue, New Delhi [F.No. 29-8/2016-NI] DOLLY CHAKRABARTY, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
